title: Automatically add Portfolio projects to an existing dashboard
excerpt: If I create a dashboard to report on one or more portfolio, will new projects added to a portfolio automatically be added to the dashboard. Similar to other requests about automatically adding boards to dashboards as the…

posts.author: gretchen.wagner (Gretchen Wagner)
posts.cookedHtml: If I create a dashboard to report on one or more portfolio, will new projects added to a portfolio automatically be added to the dashboard. Similar to other requests about automatically adding boards to dashboards as they are created in a workspace, when new projects are created daily, the maintenance on the dashboard to add them will be onerous.

posts.author: Nataliaru (Natalia)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love for there to a be way in which we can auto connect dashboards! I can see the potential Workflows has to achieve this and hopefully is something that is being considered.
